message:
✨ Register workload detection cards in cardRegistry

- Add imports for ProwJobs, ProwStatus, ProwHistory
- Add imports for LLMInference, LLMModels, MLJobs, MLNotebooks
- Register all components in CARD_COMPONENTS
- Add to DEMO_DATA_CARDS set
- Set default widths for each card type

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,195 @@ +import { useState, useEffect } from 'react' +import { CardWrapper } from './CardWrapper' +import { useGlobalFilters } from '../../hooks/useGlobalFilters' +import { + GitBranch, + CheckCircle2, + XCircle, + Clock, + Cpu, + Brain, + BookOpen, + History, +} from 'lucide-react' + +// Prow Jobs Card - shows CI/CD jobs from Prow +export function ProwJobs() { + const { selectedClusters } = useGlobalFilters() + const [jobs, setJobs] = useState>([]) + + useEffect(() => { + // Demo data - would connect to Prow API in production + setJobs([ + { name: 'pull-kubernetes-e2e', type: 'presubmit', state: 'success', startTime: '10m ago', duration: '25m', repo: 'kubernetes/kubernetes' }, + { name: 'ci-kubernetes-build', type: 'periodic', state: 'running', startTime: '5m ago', duration: '-', repo: 'kubernetes/kubernetes' }, + { name: 'pull-test-infra-verify', type: 'presubmit', state: 'failure', startTime: '15m ago', duration: '8m', repo: 'kubernetes/test-infra' }, + ]) + }, [selectedClusters]) + + return ( + +
+ {jobs.map((job, i) => ( +
+
+ +
+
{job.name}
+
{job.repo}
+
+
+
+ {job.type} + {job.state === 'success' && } + {job.state === 'failure' && } + {job.state === 'running' && } +
+
+ ))} +
+ + ) +} + +// Prow Status Card - shows Prow controller status +export function ProwStatus() { + return ( + +
+
+ Controller + + Healthy + +
+
+ Deck + + Healthy + +
+
+ Hook + + Healthy + +
+
+ + ) +} + +// Prow History Card - shows recent job history +export function ProwHistory() { + return ( + +
+
+ + Last 24h: 156 jobs, 94% success rate +
+
+ + Last 7d: 1,024 jobs, 91% success rate +
+
+ + ) +} + +// LLM Inference Card - shows LLM inference workloads +export function LLMInference() { + return ( + +
+
+
+ + vLLM Serving +
+ 4 replicas +
+
+
+ + TGI Server +
+ 2 replicas +
+
+ + ) +} + +// LLM Models Card - shows deployed LLM models +export function LLMModels() { + return ( + +
+
+ Llama-2-70B + 4x A100 +
+
+ Mistral-7B + 1x A100 +
+
+ + ) +} + +// ML Jobs Card - shows ML training jobs +export function MLJobs() { + return ( + +
+
+
+ + fine-tune-llama +
+ Running +
+
+
+ + eval-mistral +
+ Complete +
+
+ + ) +} + +// ML Notebooks Card - shows Jupyter notebooks +export function MLNotebooks() { + return ( + +
+
+
+ + research-notebook-1 +
+ Running +
+
+
+ + data-analysis +
+ Stopped +
+
+ + ) +}
